genre_refs: National Geographic 'To Catch a Smuggler' (TV series)
description: A designed television-promo graphic (square format) for the National Geographic series 'To Catch a Smuggler', co-promoted by ICE. The central photograph shows a law-enforcement officer seen from behind, wearing a dark ball cap, jacket and jeans, standing in what looks like an airport/transit terminal, holding the leash of a black detection K-9 (a Belgian Malinois in a 'SECURITY' harness) at his side. Overlaid around the figure on a desaturated teal-tinted background are bright yellow rounded-square pictogram icons (directional arrows, an airplane, a briefcase/luggage, a passport/document, a train) evoking transit, customs and search themes. A bright yellow torn/brushstroke text box across the center carries the bold dark title 'TO CATCH A SMUGGLER'. Below in yellow and white: 'NEW EPISODES / WEDS 9/8c' and the 'NATIONAL GEOGRAPHIC' logo (yellow rectangle wordmark). Fine print bottom-right: '(c)2025 National Geographic Partners, LLC.' The style is a polished broadcast key-art promo. Messaging technique: entertainment cross-promotion that valorizes ICE/HSI and CBP interdiction work as exciting, heroic TV content, normalizing enforcement through pop-culture. Target audience: TV viewers and the public, to boost the agency's image and the show's ratings.
notable_text: TO CATCH A SMUGGLER; NEW EPISODES WEDS 9/8c; NATIONAL GEOGRAPHIC; (c)2025 National Geographic Partners, LLC.
